status: DESIGN ARTIFACT; Phase-1 verdict is SCALAR_ONLY_FEASIBLE -> STOP_PROSPECTIVE, so no prospective run uses this schema. It is the required predeclared raw schema that ANY future (human-authorised) prospective phase would populate, designed to avoid the DOWNSTREAM-ORDER raw-insufficiency problem.
firewall: the excursion_block is populated ONLY in a future human-authorised prospective phase; it is empty in all DEV/Phase-1 records

identity_provenance.seed: int (fresh disjoint namespace for any prospective phase; open DEV 57xxx for feasibility only)
identity_provenance.determinism_bitmatch: bool (independent replay reproduces post-relaxation state hash)

overt_macrostate_panel_block.note: per-variable |SPIKE-SUSTAINED| at the common-clock coincidence, each vs its mechanical tolerance
overt_macrostate_panel_block.full_panel_coincidence: bool = ALL panel vars pass (else MACROSTATE_MISMATCH)

boundary_block.boundary_source_sha256: str (must be identical for both branches)

viability_tracker_block.censored: bool (any viability failure censors the world; never imputed)

hidden_residual_diagnostic.note: state-difference at the coincidence (NOT an excursion); characterisation only

excursion_block_FUTURE_ONLY.note: EMPTY in Phase-1; populated only by a human-authorised prospective run. Predeclared here so a genuine subsequent divergence is distinguishable from a numerical null.

world_disposition.class: one of {SCALAR_MATCH_FAILED, MACROSTATE_MISMATCH, CLOCK_TIME_MISMATCH, BOUNDARY_MISMATCH, TRACKER_VIABILITY_FAIL, NUMERICAL_NULL, GENUINE_DIVERGENCE(future-only), COINCIDENCE_QUALIFIED}

distinguishability_guarantee.genuine_subsequent_divergence: excursion_area_signed nonzero beyond both shams under a passed full-panel coincidence (future-only)
